lines.english: You are the True Guru, and I am Your new disciple.
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਮਿਲੁ ਅੰਤ ਕੀ ਬੇਲਾ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer mil ant kee belaa |4|2|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, O Lord, please meet me - this is my very last chance! ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਹਮ ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jab ham eko ek kar jaaniaa |
lines.english: When I realize that there is One, and only One Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੈ ਖੋਜਿ ਪਰਹੁ ਮਤਿ ਕੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hamarai khoj parahu mat koee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: No one should follow in my footsteps. ||1||Pause||
why then should the people be upset? ||1||
I am dishonored; I have lost my honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਅਪਤਿ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਨਹੀ ਲਾਜ ॥
lines.translit: pat apat taa kee nahee laaj |
lines.english: I have no shame about honor or dishonor.
I have no partnership with anyone. ||2||
I am bad, and bad in my mind as well.
Says Kabeer, honor is that which is accepted by the Lord.
But you shall know, when your own false covering is laid bare. ||3||
Give up everything - meditate, vibrate upon the Lord alone. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਨ ਕਾ ਮਿਰਗੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਸਭੁ ਹੋਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ban kaa mirag mukat sabh hog |1|
lines.english: then all the deer of the forest would be liberated. ||1||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
If Yoga could be obtained by wandering around naked,
What does it matter whether someone goes naked, or wears a deer skin,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਨਹੀ ਚੀਨਸਿ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jab nahee cheenas aatam raam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: if he does not remember the Lord within his soul? ||1||Pause||
If the spiritual perfection of the Siddhas could be obtained by shaving the head,
then why haven't sheep found liberation? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੁਸਰੈ ਕਿਉ ਨ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: khusarai kiau na param gat paaee |3|
lines.english: why then haven't eunuchs obtained the state of supreme dignity? ||3||
If someone could save himself by celibacy, O Siblings of Destiny,
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
Says Kabeer, listen, O men, O Siblings of Destiny:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਨਿ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin kin gat paaee |4|4|
lines.english: without the Lord's Name, who has ever found salvation? ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਪੈ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jau pai raam raam rat naahee |
lines.english: When people do not love the Lord's Name,
Those who take their ritual baths in the evening and the morning
are like the frogs in the water. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕੈ ਜਾਹੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: te sabh dharam raae kai jaahee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: they must all go to the Righteous Judge of Dharma. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਦਇਆ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਭੀ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tin kau deaa supanai bhee naahee |2|
lines.english: do not feel compassion, even in dreams. ||2||
Those who love their bodies and try different looks,
the Holy find peace in this ocean of pain. ||3||
The wise men call them four-footed creatures;
Says Kabeer, why do you perform so many rituals?
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
Renounce everything, and drink in the supreme essence of the Lord. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਜਪੁ ਕਿਆ ਤਪੁ ਕਿਆ ਬ੍ਰਤ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa jap kiaa tap kiaa brat poojaa |
lines.english: What use is chanting, and what use is penance, fasting or devotional worship,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਭਾਉ ਹੈ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa kai ridai bhaau hai doojaa |1|
lines.english: to one whose heart is filled with the love of duality? ||1||
Through cleverness, the four-armed Lord is not obtained. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਜਨ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਧਉ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: re jan man maadhau siau laaeeai |
lines.english: O humble people, link your mind to the Lord.
Set aside your greed and worldly ways.
Set aside sexual desire, anger and egotism. ||2||
Ritual practices bind people in egotism;
Says Kabeer, He is obtained only by devotional worship.
meeting together, they worship stones. ||3||
Through innocent love, the Lord is met. ||4||6||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
All have originated from the Seed of God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਭ ਵਾਸ ਮਹਿ ਕੁਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: garabh vaas meh kul nahee jaatee |
lines.english: In the dwelling of the womb, there is no ancestry or social status.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਰੇ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਬਾਮਨ ਕਬ ਕੇ ਹੋਏ ॥
lines.translit: kahu re panddit baaman kab ke hoe |
lines.english: Tell me, O Pandit, O religious scholar: since when have you been a Brahmin?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਮਨ ਕਹਿ ਕਹਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਮਤ ਖੋਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: baaman keh keh janam mat khoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Don't waste your life by continually claiming to be a Brahmin. ||1||Pause||
If you are indeed a Brahmin, born of a Brahmin mother,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਕਤ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣ ਹਮ ਕਤ ਸੂਦ ॥
lines.translit: tum kat braahaman ham kat sood |
lines.english: How is it that you are a Brahmin, and I am of a low social status?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਆਨ ਬਾਟ ਕਾਹੇ ਨਹੀ ਆਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tau aan baatt kaahe nahee aaeaa |2|
lines.english: then why didn't you come by some other way? ||2||
is said to be a Brahmin among us. ||4||7||
Says Kabeer, one who contemplates God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਕਤ ਲੋਹੂ ਤੁਮ ਕਤ ਦੂਧ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ham kat lohoo tum kat doodh |3|
lines.english: How is it that I am formed of blood, and you are made of milk? ||3||
